fr:resource.fr:resource-source: \DiagramSquare { nw = u, ne = u+v, sw = u, se = w, west/style = {double}, north/style = {embedding}, nw/style = dotted pullback, } \qquad \DiagramSquare { nw = v, ne = u+v, sw = v, se = w, west/style = {double}, north/style = {embedding}, nw/style = dotted pullback, }
